text: Relabel the ambiguous PROCESS/ITEM progress bars to a clear scope hierarchy: Overall → Phase → Current.

locator.quote: in gen 1). It doesn't account for the eval phase that follows, or

text: The 'process' ETA only covered the current phase (e.g. training agents in gen 1); it didn't account for the eval phase that follows, or subsequent generations — so users misread it as total time.

locator.quote: — all generations, all phases — so the user always knows how long

text: Fix: add a top-level Run ETA tracker spanning the entire run — all generations, all phases — so the user always knows time-to-done.
